task: security: PIN hash and tracker tokens stored in plaintext SharedPreferences — create EncryptedSharedPreferences store (RayniyomiSecurePrefs) with migration from plaintext for PIN hash and rayniyomi-specific tracker API tokens
learnings: Feature 1 (add security-crypto dependency) is config-only per CLAUDE.md TDD skip rules for configuration changes

security-crypto:1.0.0 uses MasterKeys.getOrCreate(MasterKeys.AES256_GCM_SPEC) — MasterKey.Builder is only in 1.1.0-alpha+. 1.0.0 is the only stable release (1.1.0-beta01 deprecates all APIs in favor of direct Android Keystore)
EncryptedSharedPreferences.create() signature in 1.0.0: (fileName, masterKeyAlias, context, keyScheme, valueScheme) — Context is 3rd arg, not 1st
Only track_token_* keys migrate to encrypted store; pref_mangasync_* stays in plaintext (upstream scope)
androidx.security:security-crypto NOT currently in libs.versions.toml — ADDED: security-crypto = 1.0.0 in gradle/androidx.versions.toml, accessed as androidx.security.crypto in build.gradle.kts
Version catalog accessor: hyphen becomes dot (security-crypto -> androidx.security.crypto)
Shell cwd is already in the worktree at .worktrees/claude/r440-encrypted-prefs
RayniyomiSecurePrefs uses initForTesting(SecureStorage) injection + InMemorySecureStorage to avoid real AndroidKeyStore in unit tests
Architecture: replaced security-crypto/EncryptedSharedPreferences with direct Keystore AES-256-GCM (KeystoreSecureStorage)
SecurityPreferences.pinHash() returns Preference<String> interface — needs custom SecureStringPreference wrapper implementing get/set/delete/changes/stateIn/isSet/key/defaultValue
UnlockActivity uses securityPreferences.pinHash().get(), .set(), .delete() and same for pinSalt()
